name: trivium
description: TRIVIUM monorepo workspace root (internal dogfood MVP; multi-tenant SaaS architecture from day one).

scripts.format: prettier --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json turbo.json eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json "apps/**/tsconfig.json" "apps/**/next.config.mjs" apps/web/app/globals.css
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json turbo.json eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json "apps/**/tsconfig.json" "apps/**/next.config.mjs" apps/web/app/globals.css
scripts.test: node -e "console.error('[TRIVIUM] test: Vitest not configured yet — IMPLEMENTATION_EXECUTION_PLAN Phase 1 Step 15.'); process.exit(1)"
